submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import XGate
bloq = XGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native single-qubit Pauli-X (NOT) bloq from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native Pauli-Z bloq; phase flip on |1>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Hadamard
bloq = Hadamard()

from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CNOT
bloq = CNOT()
submissions.construction_method: Native CNOT bloq; Qualtran convention uses first register as control (MSB), second as target.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 4x4; |10> and |11> columns swap (control=1 flips target).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TwoBitSwap
bloq = TwoBitSwap()

from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Toffoli
bloq = Toffoli()
submissions.construction_method: Native Toffoli (CCNOT) bloq; first two registers controls, third target.
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 8x8; flips target only when both controls are |1> (swap |110> and |111>).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=2)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=2) textbook QFT; default gives raw big-endian matrix without extra bit-reversal.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=3)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=3) textbook QFT; default raw big-endian 8x8 matrix.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native SGate (pi/2 phase) bloq; diag(1, i).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TGate
bloq = TGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native TGate (pi/8 phase) bloq; diag(1, e^{i pi/4}).
submissions.self_check: bloq.tensor_contract() is 2x2 diagonal with |1> phase exp(i*pi/4).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CZ
bloq = CZ()

import cirq
from qualtran.cirq_interop import CirqGateAsBloq
bloq = CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ISWAP)
submissions.construction_method: No native iSWAP bloq; wrap cirq.ISWAP via CirqGateAsBloq (swaps |01>/<10> with factor i).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: SGate().controlled(): apply S to target when first register (control/MSB) is |1>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate().controlled().controlled()
submissions.construction_method: Doubly-controlled Z via two successive .controlled() calls on ZGate (no native CCZ bloq).

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=4)
submissions.construction_method: QFTTextBook(bitsize=4) textbook QFT; default raw big-endian 16x16 matrix.
